title: Yes or No: Come Back to Me
original_title: Yes or No 2 รัก ไม่รัก อย่ากั๊กเลย
overview: Kim and Pie are in love, but after graduation they have to travel into two different directions for their internship; Kim is going to work in a farm in the northern province of Nan, while Pie is going South to work in a fishery center. Their love is being tested by the distance between them.
